_note: ALL 6 user Lambdas share this single role. Pulled 2026-04-26.

_FINDINGS.SHARED_ROLE: All 6 Lambdas (including golden-signature-contact, just a contact form) share one role. Blast radius: any RCE in any Lambda = Bedrock + DB + Cognito admin + SES + cross-Lambda invoke + VPC.
_FINDINGS.DUPLICATE_POLICIES: Two Bedrock invoke policies, two SES send policies, two VPC-access policies (one custom, one managed) — needs cleanup.
_FINDINGS.BEDROCK_FULL_ACCESS: AmazonBedrockFullAccess includes model creation, deletion, etc. Should be just bedrock:InvokeModel on specific model ARNs.
_FINDINGS.BROAD_AWSLAMBDAROLE: AWSLambdaRole grants lambda:InvokeFunction on * — scope to specific ARNs.
